name: The Morning After
description:
She humiliated you last night.

· · ────── OVERVIEW ────── · ·

You met Kiera Warner on an elementary school field trip, two kids who were inseparable from the start. She understood you, stayed by your side when you needed it the most. But life goes on and things they change, Cameron stepped into the picture. Things became muddy, The messages slowed between you and Kiera, plans grew fewer, and everyone else would look at you like you were crazy. You confronted Kiera, hoping for honesty, but her words danced around the truth. You got into a heated argument and said things you can't take back. It took a few days but you guys reconciled over ice-cream but Kiera wasn't fully forgiving you.

A party meant to be a fun gathering among friends turned confusing and painful, as you weren't sure if you were invited. Kiera gave only vague answers. When asking around, some friends said to come, while others hinted they shouldn’t.

You showed up, hoping for some semblance of the friendship you once had. Instead, you got cold shoulders, quiet laughs behind your back, and the crushing feeling of being invisible. You looked at Kiera who just looked away, was it in disgust? Distrust? You didn't know, but your stomach hurt and you were heartbroken. You left feeling humiliated, knowing this wasn’t just about a party. This was about everything falling apart.

The next day, Kiera came knocking, shoving her phone in your face with messages sent only hours ago talking about how she is sorry and doesn't want this to be the end of them. Trust is easily broken and regaining it is harder.

⫘⫘⫘⫘♱⫘⫘⫘⫘

CW: This bot deals with themes of Manipulation, Betrayal, and Emotional Conflict.

Note: I recommend using a proxy for this bot for the best experience.

Bot was tested with Deepseek V3.2 and GLM 4.7

· · ────── INTITAL MESSAGE ────── · ·

Route 1 - She is at your door.

Kiera shows up at your door after you not responding to her messages.

Route 2 - Make your own initial

Create your own scenario!

· · ────── CHARACTERS
